mapper.update:
SELECT MAX(SEQ_CURRVAL)+1 FROM TBL_SEQUENCES WHERE SEQ_NAME = #{seq_name}
UPDATE TBL_SEQUENCES SET SEQ_CURRVAL = #{seq_currval} WHERE SEQ_NAME = #{seq_name}
mapper.select: SELECT member_master.UM_CODE AS um_code , institution_master.UIS_NAME AS uis_name , member_master.UM_USERID AS um_userid , member_master.UM_NAME AS um_name , member_master.UM_UIS_CODE AS um_uis_code , member_master.UM_REG_TYPE AS um_reg_type , member_master.UM_NAME AS um_name , member_master.UM_TEL AS um_tel , member_master.UM_EMAIL AS um_email , member_master.UM_MAX_DEVICE_COUNT AS um_max_device_count , member_master.UM_MAX_LIBRARY_IN_BOOK AS um_max_library_in_book , member_master.UM_FREE_ACCOUNT AS um_free_account , member_master.UM_USEYN AS um_useyn FROM TBL_B2B_MEMBER_MASTER member_master LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_INSTITUTION_MASTER institution_master ON member_master.UM_UIS_CODE = institution_master.UIS_CODE WHERE member_master.UM_CODE = #{um_code}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO TBL_B2B_MEMBER_MASTER ( UM_CODE, UM_USERID, UM_PWD, UM_UIS_CODE,
UM_REG_TYPE,
UM_NAME,
UM_TEL,
UM_EMAIL,
UM_MAX_DEVICE_COUNT,
UM_MAX_LIBRARY_IN_BOOK,
UM_FREE_ACCOUNT,
UM_REG_USERID, UM_USEYN ) VALUES ( CONCAT('UM',LPAD(#{um_code},11,'0')), #{um_userid}, PASSWORD(#{um_pwd}), #{um_uis_code},
#{um_reg_type},
#{um_name},
#{um_tel},
#{um_email},
#{um_max_device_count},
#{um_max_library_in_book},
#{um_free_account},
#{um_reg_userid}, #{um_useyn} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE TBL_B2B_MEMBER_MASTER SET
UM_PWD = PASSWORD(#{um_pwd}),
UM_REG_TYPE = #{um_reg_type},
UM_NAME = #{um_name},
UM_TEL = #{um_tel},
UM_EMAIL = #{um_email},
UM_MAX_DEVICE_COUNT = #{um_max_device_count},
UM_MAX_LIBRARY_IN_BOOK = #{um_max_library_in_book},
UM_FREE_ACCOUNT = #{um_free_account},
UM_USEYN = #{um_useyn},
UM_UPDATEDATE = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE UM_CODE = #{um_code}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(UM_USERID) FROM TBL_B2B_MEMBER_MASTER WHERE UM_UIS_CODE = #{um_uis_code} AND UM_USERID = #{um_userid}
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_B2B_MEMBER_MASTER SET UM_PWD = PASSWORD(UM_USERID),UM_PW_CHANGE = 'N' WHERE UM_CODE = #{um_code} AND UM_UIS_CODE = #{um_uis_code}
mapper.select: SELECT @rownum := @rownum+1 AS rnum , UMD_CODE AS umd_code , UMD_UM_CODE AS umd_um_code , UMD_UID AS umd_uid , UMD_NAME AS umd_name , UMD_OS AS umd_os , UMD_REGDATE AS umd_regdate FROM TBL_MEMBER_DEVICE,(SELECT @rownum :=0) AS r WHERE UMD_UM_CODE = #{umd_um_code}

SELECT member_master.UM_CODE AS um_code , institution_master.UIS_NAME AS uis_name , member_master.UM_USERID AS um_userid , member_master.UM_NAME AS um_name , member_master.UM_UIS_CODE AS um_uis_code , member_master.UM_REG_TYPE AS um_reg_type , member_master.UM_NAME AS um_name , member_master.UM_TEL AS um_tel , member_master.UM_EMAIL AS um_email , member_master.UM_MAX_DEVICE_COUNT AS um_max_device_count , member_master.UM_MAX_LIBRARY_IN_BOOK AS um_max_library_in_book , member_master.UM_FREE_ACCOUNT AS um_free_account , member_master.UM_USEYN AS um_useyn , member_master.UM_PW_CHANGE AS um_pw_change , IFNULL(institution_master.UIS_UCP_CODE, '') AS uis_ucp_code , institution_master.UIS_WEB_LOGO_URL AS uis_web_logo_url , institution_master.UIS_MOBILE_LOGO_URL AS uis_mobile_logo_url , institution_master.UIS_KEYCOLOR AS uis_keycolor , institution_master.UIS_COMMON_BOOK_FLAG AS uis_common_book_flag , institution_master.UIS_RETURN_FLAG AS uis_return_flag , institution_master.UIS_RETURN_UI_FLAG AS uis_return_ui_flag , institution_master.UIS_PW_FLAG AS uis_pw_flag FROM TBL_B2B_MEMBER_MASTER member_master LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_INSTITUTION_MASTER institution_master ON member_master.UM_UIS_CODE = institution_master.UIS_CODE WHERE member_master.UM_UIS_CODE = #{um_uis_code} AND member_master.UM_USERID = #{um_userid} AND member_master.UM_PWD = PASSWORD(#{um_pwd})

SELECT UIS_AUTH_METHOD AS uis_auth_method, UIS_COMMON_BOOK_FLAG AS uis_common_book_flag, UIS_COPY_BOOK_FLAG AS uis_copy_book_flag, UIS_PREVIEW_FLAG AS uis_preview_flag, UIS_RETURN_FLAG AS uis_return_flag, UIS_RETURN_UI_FLAG AS uis_return_ui_flag, UIS_PW_FLAG AS uis_pw_flag FROM TBL_INSTITUTION_MASTER WHERE UIS_CODE = #{um_uis_code}
SELECT COUNT(UM_CODE) FROM TBL_B2B_MEMBER_MASTER WHERE UM_UIS_CODE = #{um_uis_code} AND UM_USERID = #{um_userid}

SELECT member_master.UM_CODE AS um_code , institution_master.UIS_NAME AS uis_name , member_master.UM_USERID AS um_userid , member_master.UM_NAME AS um_name , member_master.UM_UIS_CODE AS um_uis_code , member_master.UM_REG_TYPE AS um_reg_type , member_master.UM_NAME AS um_name , member_master.UM_TEL AS um_tel , member_master.UM_EMAIL AS um_email , member_master.UM_MAX_DEVICE_COUNT AS um_max_device_count , member_master.UM_MAX_LIBRARY_IN_BOOK AS um_max_library_in_book , member_master.UM_FREE_ACCOUNT AS um_free_account , member_master.UM_USEYN AS um_useyn , IFNULL(institution_master.UIS_UCP_CODE, '') AS uis_ucp_code , institution_master.UIS_WEB_LOGO_URL AS uis_web_logo_url , institution_master.UIS_MOBILE_LOGO_URL AS uis_mobile_logo_url , institution_master.UIS_KEYCOLOR AS uis_keycolor , institution_master.UIS_COMMON_BOOK_FLAG AS uis_common_book_flag , institution_master.UIS_PREVIEW_FLAG AS uis_preview_flag , institution_master.UIS_RETURN_FLAG AS uis_return_flag , institution_master.UIS_RETURN_UI_FLAG AS uis_return_ui_flag FROM TBL_B2B_MEMBER_MASTER member_master LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_INSTITUTION_MASTER institution_master ON member_master.UM_UIS_CODE = institution_master.UIS_CODE WHERE member_master.UM_UIS_CODE = #{um_uis_code} AND member_master.UM_USERID = #{um_userid} ORDER BY member_master.UM_CODE ASC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO TBL_MEMBER_FORM_INFO ( UDF_NAME, UDF_TELL, UDF_DEP, UDF_DOB, UDF_OS, UDF_IP, UDF_INSTITUTION
) VALUES ( #{udf_name}, #{udf_tel}, #{udf_dep}, #{udf_dob}, #{udf_os}, #{udf_ip}, #{udf_institution} )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(UDF_TELL) FROM TBL_MEMBER_FORM_INFO WHERE UDF_TELL = #{udf_tel}
SELECT COUNT(UMEI_TEL) FROM TBL_MEMBER_ENTRY_INFO WHERE UMEI_NAME= #{entry_um_name} AND UMEI_TEL = #{entry_um_phone}
